title: Delhi Court Denies Interim Medical Bail To Ex-RCom Director Punit Garg In Rs 40,000 Crore Laundering Case
description: Rouse Avenue court denied interim medical bail to ex-RCom Director Punit Garg, accused in a Rs 40,000 crore laundering case, citing AIIMS report that tests aren’t urgent now and directing government hospital referral if later required.
